CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Deborah Neville. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-02-2003 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Oct-07-03 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Claim [Minor]
Off Calendar Jun-06-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR. Margaret DelCoto
Appearances:
Julie Maneker, Esq. for Plaintiff Joseph Jajeh Sr. the guardian ad litem for the minor also present, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants the compromise as follows:
Compromise: $25,000.00
Medical bills $831.38
Attorney's fees: $4,375.00.
Proposed judgment submitted and to be reviewed and signed by the commissioner.
After reviewed of the proposed judgment submiited, the Court grants
A net balance of $19,803.62 for the minor, to be deposited into a blocked account at Washington Mutual lacated at 98 West Portal Ave., San Francisco, until minor's reaches the age of 18. Order signed after hearing.

Minor'S Compromise In Scd At 09:00 A.M. On May 20, 2003
Off Calendar Jun-06-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR. Margaret DelCoto
Appearances:
Julie Maneker, Esq. for Plaintiff Joseph Jajeh Sr., the guardian ad litem also present, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants the compromise as follows:
Compromise: $25,000.00
Medical bills of $821.38
Attorney's fees: $4375.00
Proposed order is taken under submission, for review of the net balance amount to the minor.
The Court signs the order granting the compromise after reviewing the proposed order.
A net balance of $19,803.62 for the minor is to be deposited into a blocked account with Washington Mutual, located at 98 West Portal Ave., San Francisco until minor's reaches the age of 18.

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Claim [Minor]
Off Calendar May-21-2003 Continued To Jun-03-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR. Lois Jones.
Appearances:
Julie Maneker, Esq. for Minor Plaintiff Joseph Jajeh, the guardian ad litem, Anthony Jajeh is also present.
This matter is ordered continued to June 3, 2003 for cousel to file an amended petition and to submit any medical infomation regarding the out standing or unpaid bills, if, what, why and when to be paid.
Order signed in open court.

Minor'S Compromise In Scd At 09:00 A.M. On May 20, 2003
